name: Fillings for Savory Strudel
recipeInstructions:
CHEESE
1 lb ricotta, farmers cheese or homemade cheese
2 tablespoons chopped green onions
salt and pepper -- to taste
1 egg
POTATO FILLING:
1. Cook onions in oil until they are brown and crispy.
2. Cook potatoes in their skins. Peel them as soon as they are cool enough to handle.
3. Mash the potatoes. Stir in onions and seasonings.
CHEESE FILLING:
1. Crumble cheese with a fork.
2. Stir in rest of ingredients.
